review_text: Lovely site, facilities are clean and good. Slab spots are spacious. Don’t try sleep between 5-6pm though, bloody bird orchestra 🤣
Very clean cabin and had everything you need to be self contained.
Just another van park .
Geat location pleasant helpfull staff

4 stars rather than 5 and only for two reasons.
- one of the women on reception is really quite rude! Not great for first impression and your initial face of the campsite. Quite unhelpful on the phone when booking too - I recognised her manner when I got there from speaking with her on the phone.
- can’t be helped much by the staff but the showers are a bit grim due to some of the guests I guess? Used band aids left on the side of the showers. Unpleasant smells lingering. Toilets not flushed after use. All a bit gross really and is the main reason I would often stay in an Airbnb if communal showers are not up to scratch.

Great holiday park. Love the little Airstream caravan I stayed in,super cute,cosy,well set out and very clean. The toilet block was clean and tidy,well set out,included disabled toilet/shower and a mother and bubs cubicle with a baby bath. Palms offered privacy for the cabins and the taller palm trees gave a tropical feel along with homes for the hundreds of beautiful rainbow lorikeets that came in every evening to sleep. The staff were great and the place was nice and quiet at night. Got great sleep! Definitely recommend!
An unserem Platz und auf den Straßen hat es abends nur so gewimmelt von Kakerlaken. Richtig widerlich.

Quaint smaller park 4 blokes from the shops and Woolies.  Clean favilities with plenty og hot water.  There's a pool at the front and play swings etc at the back next to the camp kitchen, which is well appointed.  A short drive to the beach.  All things considered its a pretty good spot to hold up for a while.
Good sites, easy check in procedure, good amenities. Gorgeous show from the lorikeets before sunset
Nice park, with ducks walking are the vans. Fair price for a powered camper van site. Highly recommended!

I stayed here over the Easter long weekend 2026 and the park was full. I was surprised that there was no onsite manager to attend to the power outage which left the boom gates down so nobody could enter or exit the property
If an emergency vehicle was required it wouldn’t have been able to gain access.

The park has possums and rats around at night and regularly visit the communal kitchen area especially overnight when it’s dark and quiet.
The area wasn’t cleaned of a morning before people started cooking breakfast or cleaning their dishes.
This meant the benches were covered in pet poop
I addressed this with the grounds person and was informed the bathrooms were being cleaned first before the kitchen.

Overgrown areas around waterways meant mosquitoes had a great breeding ground

Another concern was the office opening hours were not consistent with the timetables.
We were advised that the office would be open until 5:00 pm but when I went there at 4:50 pm it was closed.

Breakfast on Easter Sunday was advertised as 2 free pancakes for each resident but when I arrived I was told  they had underestimated the amount of people in the park.  I thought that hard to do considering the entire park was booked out

Open fires were allowed to be lit at dinner time which wasn’t allowed but there was no management on site to monitor or address this.

Very disappointing management of the site considering the amount charged to use these facilities over a special time of the year to get together with family in a central location.

Unless Ingenia Holidays addresses the parks facilities as a group and manages it better I wouldn’t recommend using this location.

Just spent Easter long weekend at this lovely park and could not recommend more highly. We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin for our family of 5 (2 adults, 3 kids) and it was lovely and very affordable. Modern tidy cabins with fans, air conditioning, good size kitchen and bathroom, and neat, clean, comfortable furniture. Good size pool and mini pool for the smaller kiddies, plus a playground near the camp kitchen. We had family camping on one of the powered sites and we all had a wonderful time. The little unexpected bonuses of the balloon man, pancake morning, arts and crafts for the kids, and wildlife show, were a lovely addition to a fun stay. Staff friendly and helpful, we will definitely stay again.
First day and we have no power until late, bathrooms take a bit long to be cleaned and sometimes running out paper.
Beautiful place

No vale para nada el costo del servicio. El wifi no llega a los sites. Pague un powered site y me dieron uno unpowered con la solución de que si queria usar los enchufes me compre un cable largo. Las instalaciones se pueden usar hasta las 7pm y la cocina te apagan la luz a las 10pm, que además está sucia y LLENA de ratas. Peor camping en el que me quede, dinero muy mal gastado!!

I just wanted to share a bit about our recent stay at your site. As an older couple, it was our first time there, and we brought our dogs along. We had a wonderful time, and even though the site was full, it never felt overwhelming.
The staff were incredibly helpful and friendly, making our stay even more enjoyable. The site itself was immaculate, and we loved the pizza idea – the team behind it was fantastic! The showers and toilets were very well maintained, and we appreciated the easy access to local activities.
All in all, we had a great experience, and we look forward to visiting again in the future.
The cabins are clean and the staffs are very friendly.
Bon camping. Bungalow un peu vétuste, la douche avait un réglage qui rendait l'eau trop chaud ou trop froide donc nous avons utilisés les sanitaires communs. Mais pour le reste tout était ok.

The campsite is well maintained, but the sites are a bit small and there were lots of mosquitoes!
The kitchen was fine.
The bathrooms were fine.

Absolutely love this caravan Park have stayed here many times.

Sites are so lovely and tranquil, camp kitchen n pool and activities within the park are great.
Staff are great n personable even help you get onto a site.

Location is great easy to get a bus and walk to town Tewantin.
RSL has a courtesy bus.

Noosa isn’t far to go for a beach swim

Todas las instalaciones están super bien, todo muy limpio, y en general la gente del camping era bastante tranquila. Si tengo que decir algo negativo… es que los pájaros empiezan a chillar a las 4 a.m! Pero a CHILLAR! Es horrible.
Easy to find. Quite close to the river. Clean amenities and overall park is tidy.  Located close to ferry shops and river.

Worst experience ever we had blood on the sheets and mould on the sheets the shower nob fell of you could only have a really cold shower or a really hot one the aircon was horrible the mold was black mold the pool hours were ridiculous all the staff could say was we would have maintenance look at the shower the day we were leaving should’ve been reimbursed our money 👎

We stayed on a powered site with our caravan.. awesome help from the park staff with backing in the van.  Camp kitchen was fully equipped.. shower & toilet amenities clean spacious and modern .  Thursday night we bought GF based pizza from the regular Thursday pizza van , which visits every Thursday at the caravan park front gate👍🏻
GREAT PLACE!!! Clean Bathrooms, great facilities, lots of loud birds. I'm happy we showed up here and they has a spot!!! Yey!
Great convenient holiday
Stayed in the done tent. Surprisingly very spacious and well equipped.
Stayed in our caravan the spaces where very small and tight had a lot of trouble parking our van and just as much trouble getting out the rest of the park was good and staff very helpful
Awesome park with a great camp kitchen and wonderful pool. Close to everything Noosa within minutes

Payer 74$, pour ne pas avoir d'électricité et de wifi alors que cela devait êtreinclus dans le prix de la nuit. Certes il y a eu une coupure d'électricité mais après avoir demandé une compensation pour le manque de service, on me la refusé.
Spaces are a bit tight to get into. Older caravan park,but nice enough.

Great staff. Lovely park. Lee, Rob and the staff are wonderful. They are friendly and make your stay easy and enjoyable always on hand to help or have a chat. Rob is an expert in guiding you and your van into the perfect spot - thanks mate, makes for a stress free set up after a long drive. The amenities are always spotless and if there is anything extra you need, staff are always on hand. Great pool for lane swimming or just to have fun. Super location, bus stop right outside the park and only a 1.2 walk into Tewantin or turn right and you are at the Noosa Northshore ferry. Thanks everyone!
Direkt neben einer Bushaltestelle gelegen und mit super Facilities 🫶🏻 haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.

No toilet paper in ladies toilets for morning rush before check out. People helping themselves from the supply cupboard to make sure all bathrooms had what was needed. Overflowing sanitary bins. Not a great location.

Arrived just after 11am. Friendly informative receptionist. Met at site 47 to help park the van as it is notorious for being on the tight side.  Rob was great took the stress out of parking the van, spot on with his directions. He got us between the pad and a tree first time. He gets 5 stars for service. It probably would have taken us a few goes to get it right. Site 47 is opposite the ablutions and laundry with a dump point there as well. The first evening a couple of backpackers were emptying their toilet canister and either that or the dump point when open was rank. I was going for a shower and the ladies ablutions smelt of the dump point, disgusting!
Might be an idea to have that dump point a bit further away from vans and amenities or keep it smelling sweeter.
The ablutions were clean although old and well used. There is only the one lot of ablutions in the park with a couple of extra toilets by the pool.
The pool looked nice didn't use it a bit too cold for us. The games room was nice but the TV was out of order. I'm sure they make enough money to pop to The Good Guys and get a new one.
The grounds were well maintained and bins emptied regularly. It was pretty quiet except for evening roosting when the birds arrived and the noise they make is unreal. Didn't last too long though and luckily not noisy in the morning.
Other than for the smelly dump point on that first night it's been okay.
We could ride our bike to the marina little cafe there did excellent coffee and scones. There a fish and chips shop we might try before we leave. You can ride into noosa for the main beach, Hastings Street and coffee and cake at the surf club. Driving is a pain and parking is near impossible.
The sites once again ( it must be a Queensland thing ) are so close that you can hear the neighbours breath. Great location though away from the hustle and bustle.
Great amenities and very well kept caravan park. Was very impressed.
Great little park.  Tidy and clean rooms were perfect for the night before we hit the great cooloola walk
really nice place, friendly stuff. but could have more suppliers as cutlery, plates and pans. We miss that while staying couple days over there.

Ingenia Holidays Noosa North in Tewantin is a fantastic family-friendly holiday park, perfect for a Sunshine Coast getaway. Just a 15-minute drive from Noosa Main Beach and Hastings Street, it offers a range of accommodation options, from spacious villas to powered caravan sites and unique glamping Belle Tents. The park is well-maintained, with clean amenities, a heated swimming pool, kids’ wading pool, playground, and a popular camp kitchen with a pizza oven. Staff are friendly and accommodating, often going the extra mile to ensure a great stay. The location is ideal, with easy access to Noosa’s attractions, including a bus stop right outside for hassle-free trips to the beach or nearby Noosa Marina. Some guests noted that the Belle Tents could use some maintenance due to mustiness, and the pool closes early at 5:30 PM, which might disappoint some. Overall, it’s a clean, fun, and convenient base for exploring Noosa, highly recommended for families or groups looking for a relaxed yet activity-packed holiday.

Honnêtement, bungalow en bord d'entrée du camping. Le bungalow est  équipé correctement mais le bruit et le passage est constant.

Je pense qu'ils mettent ce bungalow pour les réservations courtes. Mais dans ce cas il faudrait le préciser et adapter le tarif.

Très déçu, rapport qualité prix faible pour ma part.

Pour conclure je ne juge pas les emplacements caravane et camping car, bi les autres bungalows.

Mais ce bungalow qui nous a été attribué, c 'est la catastrophe. Je vous laisse juger sur les photos et la vidéo.

TripAdvisor and BIG4 Holiday Parks call this “Ingenia Holidays Noosa North” but is called “Noosa North holiday & caravan park” as well as “Ingenia Holidays Noosa North” by Ingenia Holiday Parks, “Noosa Caravan Park” by Agoda and “Noosa Tewantin Cvan Pk” by Google Map, all have the same address.  Why its management does not require everyone, especially the booking agencies, to use the same name?|The cabin was clean and spacious. See photos.  Car parking lot was just next to the cabin.  Had all we needed except there was not enough space around the wash basin for toiletries for 3 persons.  It was peaceful: we did not hear any disturbance during our stay.  Great value for money.  We enjoyed our 2 nights stay there.
Average…
We didn't have a room but a powered site for our campervan. We were close together but that at was OK.  The facilities were clean and tidy.

Super camping! On est même resté une nuit de plus tellement on a adoré. La dame à l’accueil est très gentille ça fait plaisir. Tout est très propre, la camp kitchen est bien, il y a même un four à pizza. Le camping est calme, le rapport qualité prix parfait car on est proche du centre ville, il y a même un arrêt de bus à côté du camping si vous ne voulez pas prendre la voiture.

Gotta say if your looking for q coupke of days probably perfect but we had a stay of nearly two weeks ...despite a poster sighting they will clean the cabin on 7th day  ..it never happened , despite heater floor was cold ... and had to buy more toilet paper and rubbish bags because office shut or not answering phone , eventually I got some fresh towels and loo paper . Would not advise to stay there again. Like I said couple days max ! Lesson learned.
Peaceful quiet park, with well maintained facilities, sites well maintained with plenty of space and friendly staff
Lovely spot. Could do with a bit of refurb but served our needs well which was to be close to the start of the Noosa Enduro
Dog friendly park. Bathrooms are clean. Bring coins for the laundry. Has a pool (that's not heated). Very quiet at night. Our stay was pleasant.
Quiet location, really nice park with a pizza oven😁

Emplacement de camping et parties communes propres et bien entretenues.
Mais surtout, personnel très agréable, sympathique et arrangeant.
Très bon rapport qualité prix à proximité des points d’intérêts de Noosa !
The amenities were clean and great playground. Sites small and it advertises the pool is heated, which is why we chose this park but it wasn’t. The beach was warmer.

Nice clean cabins, good value for money and very helpful staff. However, they cancelled our booking and rebooked our room to someone else without our confirmation on the day which was very stressful. There had been miscommunication with the third party we had booked through so I understand it would have been confusing for the staff, but it did take a while to sort out. We did get a free room upgrade at least. Will be booking direct with places now to avoid this!!

The cabin was clean and comfortable it had everything we needed. The staff were helpful and kind, no complaints there.  Nice pool etc and handy having a coffee van to.
However, we were both woken early some mornings by the bins (delivery?). Then another occasion we woke to a loud BANG BANG BANG we both flew out of our rooms in "flight mode" not knowing what was going on. We thought someone was banging on the door and it was some kind of emergency, but I reckon it was a cleaner getting something out of the bottom of a bucket. The cabin (100) was next to the reception area where they all worked, unfortunately.
What upset us the most was being told the "Pet Rules" just 24 hrs before because we then had to cancel everything we spent the week booking. We couldn't get refunds for everything either, so very disheartening.  I must have made around 10 calls asking questions, so I should have been told then. When I complained I was told AI automatically sends it. I guess if we were told we would be stuck in the cabin (and we booked for 5 days!) with no Netflix and poor internet service, we wouldn't have booked because they don't do refunds either.

L'endroit calme , tranquille et bien aménagé. Les personnels sympa , les chouettes ballades a proximité, pour les amateurs de lève et couché de soleil c'est un paradis. Le quartier est tranquille et intéressant. Aucun regret d'avoir passé la nuit dans un bungalow . Propre , bien équipé et confortable.

As a family travelling on the road we have experienced staying at many campgrounds. We can honestly say we have felt most at home at Noosa North Shore. This is mostly down to the nature of the staff - always friendly and always willing to help wherever they can. Special thanks to Kayla for going above and beyond during a difficult situation we encountered with our caravan. No doubt we will back one day. Thanks Ingenia Noosa North

We stay for 4 days. Is quite a big park so plenty of room to put caravans on.
They squashed all the caravans into 1 street, very muddy, felt like sardines, everytime someone left with their caravans we all had to move our cars! Service and cleanness of the park was great but next time spread the vans out! It’s hard enough parking a van let alone with tons of vans and everyone having 4WD’s! Won’t be staying again

Booked the Cabin and we wouldn’t do it again. First of all, it’s not clean, mould can be seen on the sofa, and other furniture. We were expected to clean up — wash the dishes (else, we will be charged 50aud?!), take out the trash.

It’s not exactly a hotel, probably to manage your expectations if you happen to book it.

The bed, luckily clean. Extremely soft tho. Like, we were sinking.

Shower water pressure was good.

Location-wise — you still need to drive 20mins to Noosa main beach and the national park. Mmm. Yeah.
Great

We really enjoyed our stay here. A no frills cabin, that had everything we needed. It was great; in the evenings we watched and listened to all the birds coming to the trees, reach a crescendo, then go quiet as it got dark. Facilities are great: laundry, pool, games area, also has a machine to change notes into coins, which is helpful. Staff messaged on Thursday night, about a pizza van on-site, which was really convenient. The location is close to so many great walking trails, shopping opportunities and beaches. Very reasonable rates. The whole family were very relaxed by the date of departure.
The cabin was a little cramped  but clean and the parking space is tight, the bed was comfortable the only downside was there is 10 different channel two no other stations😩
Cdein Cabin was goood

Eigentlich wollten wir auf dem Campground nahe bei der Stadt übernachten, doch dort war ausgebucht. Also bezogen wir eine komfortable Site im Noosa North. Zum Glück! Nicht nur der Platz gefiel uns besser, auch die Lage war für uns ideal, denn die Noosa Marina ist schnell zu erreichen. Von dort fährt nicht nur die Fähre direkt in die Stadt, sondern es gibt auch eine Reihe sehr netter Restaurants und gute Einkaufsmöglichkeiten. Alles etwas abseits vom Trubel in Noosa. Der Campground selbst bietet große Stellplätze direkt unter Palmen, eine sehr gut ausgestattete Küche und saubere Sanitäranlagen.

Lovely campsite with good facilities. Our camper van broke down so we missed our last night there but they were kind enough to refund that night and still let us use the facilities the next day when we went back to collect our chairs that they looked after.

Average all around with rude staff and not a great location. When asking for an extra bin bag to put out rubbish per the militant instructions, you'd think you had just asked for the staff to donate a kidney.

Dear Lee and staff,
Thank you for a great week. Studio Cabin was just right for 2 people and close to relatives 2 bedroom cabin. Pool and play area greatly utilised.
Facilities were very clean and location is close to Noosaville and beaches.

Very nice campsite. Parked here for two nights, came in after hours and they made sure to give us instructions on how to get to our spot and where our spot was.
Staff was very nice and helpful, prices aren't expensive, city centre is just a bit away. But no worries with a uber or bike.
Definitely recommend going here.
Séjour dans une petite caravane à côté des toilettes et la douche était directement dedans ! Propre, calme, piscine sympa et accueil très gentil

Super small sites, people piled on top of each other. We had no where to park our car and our caravan isn’t even a big one.

It was a nightmare trying to pull in and out of the caravan park. It appears that personal vehicles take up a large section of space that I assume would’ve originally been used as a through road for traffic

Pool is lovely although insanely deep
And ammenities were spotless

This campsite is located in Tewantin about 15 minute walk from the town's shops and marina which offers a river ferry to the popular and trendy resort of Noosa Heads. This makes it quiet and peaceful. The amenities include a reasonably sized saltwater pool, games room, showers,laundry ,dump point, free WiFi, and camp kitchen with several bbq hot plates, and fridges for campers to use, but no utensils, pots or pans. All were spotlessly clean.

The cleanliness of this caravan was one of the worst I’ve ever been too….and un-excusable  for the price you pay for a squished patch of uneven ground. Unfortunately you feel like you a living in your neighbours pockets. The ladies bathrooms were horrific. Bins overflowing with flies and insects coming out of them. Rubbish everywhere, was not impressed.
The amenities at the campsite are clean, but the sites are too tight.
Clean amenities helpful staff. A bit tight to get in but otherwise great. Close to Shops, river.
Great experience at this campsite, the staff are very helpful and professional. Clean and well-maintained places, I highly recommend it.
Really nice camping, super helpful staff !

Thank you for the large caravan site which was super quiet. We like this caravan park as it is quiet and convenient to Noosa, especially if one cycles around. There is also a great swimming pool, clean bathroom facilities and a book swop/tv room.

We stayed in a Standard Cabin and the Queen bed was comfortable but the couch had seen better days. The camp kitchen is fantastic and the local RSL has raffles on a Friday night as well as a courtesy bus that can be booked.

This park has all the standard features that most of the larger caravan parks have, with a pool, camp kitchen, great amenities block all kept very clean neat and tidy.
All the staff were very friendly and attentive, and the prices were reasonable for the area.
All in all a very pleasant stay and experance.

It's a pleasant setting with good amenities, including a well-maintained pool. However, the sites are quite small, and you can easily hear your neighbors, which may disturb the peace. It's also a bit far from Noosa's center, requiring some transport. The rates are somewhat high given the size of the sites, but the facilities are of good quality, making it a suitable option for families or travelers seejking comfort.

Very unhelpful reception staff, arrived at park and the site given to us was without  the most unacceptable setting $66 per night-bloody bouncy six feet away and the back of a film projected also six feet away. That’s all we have sir! Remembering we booked this some time ago !!  Noosa holiday completely messed up thanks very much. Now back to the friendly Gold Coast
Reply to your response
Perhaps if you had informed us of the disgraceful site position when we booked, we could of made other arrangements, and not travelled from SA to be very disappointed.
Camping très cher ($137 pour un emplacement van) pour être entassé en rang d’onions. Quartier sans intérêt et loin du centre de Noosa Heads
Great caravan park in Noosa. Best bit was the lovely guy who helps you back in the caravan. Just amazing. Everything clean  and tidy. Unheated pool which is a culture shock when you first get in.
Occupied a site at this park for five days, and while it's not uninviting, the adjacent permanent sites may not offer the most appealing views for travelers.
Great spot, close to Noosa and surrounds. Hot showers, clean amenities. Kids park is great and camp kitchen is what you want, even a pizza oven.
Great place highly recommended

Stay at site 38 broken pipe Before I turned up ,fix But there was lime or ?? I don't know around the slap . Nothing to see here . Maybe offer me another site or refund. Not coming back, Bob could do with some more people skill .
Liked

Bad experience, won't come back. Too bad because others Ingenia are nicer.
I called in the afternoon to have some info, left a message with my number, no one called me back.
The pool table is stuck so don't put coins in it. Luckily the reception was still open.
Nice kitchen area but you have to leave at 10pm.
Check out is at 10am but the ladies is closed at 9:30... So dumb
The maintenance man was standing in front of us folding our rooftent and asking to leave at 10:20... So rude
He kept insisting that we move the car : we are folding our rooftent we don't move the car!
A couple is waiting for our camping site but it is written no check in before 11 am... So you have to be friends with the maintenance guys to have privileges
Overnight stay on the way through. Really clean. Nice and friendly staff. Only thing thing I could wish for was for it to be cheaper for singles.
Bambi is so lovely with cool setup. Staff are super friendly here. We felt very welcomed and had a great stay here!
A place where it’s very close to the north shore ferries, where also close to the mini town with restaurant and supermarket. Fit for family stay and easily stay for couple for transition.

We were travelling through and were only there for one night. The campground was fully booked due to the long weekend. Nevertheless, it was quiet and we had a pleasant short stay. The amenities and pool were clean. We have always had good experiences with Ingenia Holidays.
Muddy sites, in front of the camp kitchen so it's noisy late at night and also in front of kids park so noisy early too.
Cabin was comfortable and adequate even if a bit dated.  Parking was tight.
Ingenia holidays Noosa normal for 3 nights $127, very safe and nice facilities, has swimming pool and pizza oven

The fact that this park is the same price as the maroochydore ingenia is baffling. The park is nice but it’s way too small for the amount of sites/people. These are the smallest sites I’ve ever stayed on which means you can hear your neighbours when they’re getting frisky or having a domestic. The bathrooms would be nice but three sinks for that many people? It’s difficult to stay clean. Kitchen would be good if there was more of them- struggled to fit yourself in around other guests cooking, washing up and sitting at one of the three tables. It just felt so cramped the whole time.

Loved my stay here for 1 night on a powered site. The service was 5-star, from booking me in last-minute to letting me stay a little past check-out to give my clothes time to dry! Nice vibe at the park, quiet to sleep, and great, clean facilities.
It is very noisy.  They have campers near the rooms.  There were noises well into the night.
Amazing stay everything is very well curated and clean. ❤️
V8 cars racing their motors at 5:30 in the morning next to our cabin. Sorry, not funny at all!

This is by far the worse caravan park we’ve stayed at. I feel like it’s a National Lampoons holiday. We’ve just had a post Christmas holiday in our campervan stopping at many caravan parks along the way, as we’re travelling with our dogs. We’ve been here one night, have had no sleep thanks to the family next door to us in a tent and a very distressed toddler screaming at multiple times during the night lasting for no less than half an hour at a time. They also find it necessary to yell at their friends the whole time who are staying in the caravan next to them, so we all have to listen to their interaction whilst trying to relax and enjoy some serenity. Atleast a dozen kids on their bikes from 7am going round and round the park with training wheels so loud we could hear them from Africa. We’re all squished in like sardines between each other, another family next to us thought it would be ‘funny’ last night to hype their dog up, making it bark while they all sat around laughing for what seemed forever, making our dog anxious. The irony is this is the most expensive caravan park we’ve stayed at during our trip and we’re now going to go home unrested ready for our return to work next week. We’ve been here one night and want to leave. We’re dreading today. Would not recommend.

Good sites, a lot of shade, clean amenities and helpful staff.
Note that there is only one amenities block, so distance to amenities will vary.

We loved our stay here. Friendly amazing staff. Clean amenities, nice deep pool also has a baby pool for little ones. Dog friendly which is awesome. It’s a smaller park so felt so safe with my little boy riding his bike and scooter. one of the groundsmen will back you in usually Rob. Such a nice vibe we extended our stay a few times :). Close to Tewantin shops and only a 15 min drive to Noosa or you can take the ferry from the marina in Tewantin which I Highly recommend. We had such a wonderful time staying here. I highly recommend it if you don’t want to be in the hustle and bustle of Noosa.

Rezeption sehr nett,
Schwimmingpool hält sich nicht an die Öffnungszeiten,schade nach einem langen Reisetag,
Plätze sind sehr eng,
Waschhaus schmutzig und ungepflegt,
Ab 5 Uhr morgens Lärm, schreiende Kinder, bellende Hunde,
Küche nicht sauber, dafür überall Schilder das man Videoüberwacht wird und Strafen drohen. NA JA

Good location, however first caravan park I have been to where the pool and kids games room shuts at 5:30. Everyone walking outside the pool was shocked that it closed soo early. Also cabins are slightly old but well maintained.

Family of 5 we paid just over $100 a night for a site and the pool was shut at 5.30 pm when still 30 degrees celcius. 3 very upset little boys  and the groundskeeper and one lady behind the counter  is extremely rude. Nice location but defiantly not value for money
At 10min drive from noosa, it’s a good place to stay, with swimming pool and good share kitchen, quiet place.

Amazing stay at Ingenia Noosa North. Such friendly, helpful staff for our entire stay. The amenities block was super clean and new. The park was quiet, clean and tidy. A mixture of families, backpackers and couples. Couldn’t recommend more highly. Will be back.

We stayed here in September as part of our east coast trip and it was our favourite campsite we stayed at! The camp kitchen was very spacious and clean, plenty of fridge space. They had a fabulous pool which we used most days and the staff we all lovely. We will definitely be back next time we are in Noosa!

It's a nice park, but our caravan van site was a bit tight. Only a short drive into Noosa itself where parking is at a premium... but lovely to wander and enjoy the sights and views.. a tad on the expensive side...
Loved the nearby Everglades cruise tour.. where the waters are 100 % reflective due to their colour...and the Noosa beach is nice..
Overall a good base to explore.
Beautiful, peaceful camp site. Clean amenities.
Very modern and well maintained.
Very good service and people !!

Cabin was clean and cosy!
Suited our needs for the stay
Staff were friendly 🤩
Back again for another stay third this year. Can't fault this park with friendly staff great groundsmen and good location just out of rush of Noosa

We absolutely loved our stay here.
Fantastic facilities, the park is beautifully maintained and the pool is awesome! Lush greenery through out the park and a really lovely community feel.
Our mobile coffee van was welcomed by locals and travellers alike and this is most definitely going to be a regular spot for us to visit.

Huge thank you to Deb, John and all of the crew who go out of their way to make you feel welcome. You guys are seriously the best

Sehr gut ausgestattete Campküche

Wir haben den Hausmeister nach Hilfe gefragt und uns wurde direkt geholfen. Toller Service!

Saubere Toiletten

Sehr gute Busanbindung an Noosa Heads

Nice Caravan Park with cabins. Like most parks in this region at this time of year it is a big crowded but the amenities are clean and new.
The park management is very helpful & pleasant.

Always clean with friendly staff. Very handy position, big van sites, pricing is good with your G'day rewards card. Ok another caravan trip. As usual great service, assistance with van parking, clean, well maintained park and facilities.  Lots of walks nearby, in fact next door which is perfect if you have a dog for those earlymorning walkies. Caught the ferry to Noosa from Tewantin with our dog. $40 return with senior discount.  Breakfast at the Marina at Cafe Vincino also dog friendly.  This is a fabulous park. Nearby Eumundi markets Saturday/Wednesday.  Don't forget Noosa Botanic Gardens at Cooroy. Also special walk along the shores of Lake Coroibah.

This is our second time staying at this park. I actually would call it a tropical oasis rather than a park.
Deb & her wonderful team went above and beyond for us. She really did and we couldn’t thank her enough for everything!
The workers within the park, are always so friendly, and busy. Including helping other fellow travellers with their vans, motor homes ect park up safely with their direction & guides because we all know reversing a caravan, kids & dogs in the car is stressful enough 😂

Not only is it pet friendly which is a super bonus for us, but games room & a pool for the kiddies & well for us big kids too 😂

I would also like to add, This is one of the cleanest parks I’ve ever been too since travelling, the showers, laundry, even the bins including their recycling containers around the  grounds are emptied daily. That’s how wonderful the grounds keepers are at their jobs.

We certainly enjoyed our beautiful holiday, & the warm weather that’s for sure.
We 100% will be back, hopefully sooner rather than later.

Thankyou for having us again..until next time, we just hope we don’t freeze to much down here in Victoria beforehand ⛄️

Jack Jones & Family 💖
We have stayed here multiple times and would highly recommend. Nice and clean facilities and amenities and super friendly staff!

Camp site was lovely and shady and kitchen facilities excellent
The only downside is that you need to drive everywhere as there are no shops or beach nearby however they accommodated my pups and ground staff were super friendly.

Thanks to the management and all the team at Ingenia Noosa North for providing spotlessly clean and well-maintained amenities. Everything we needed and all of what we wanted. Even turned on the sunshine for us. It is wonderful to see a happy team working together well supported from the top. We would not hesitate to stay here again.

Very well run park clean and tidy up to date amenities
Close to city centre
Toller Platz. In der Hochsaison Reservierung angebracht.

This thieves not only tried to charge me twice, but also overcharged me. They even sent me an invoice of something that was already paid, and the invoice I’ve was lower that what I have paid. I am still asking them for a refund and they don’t even show up.
Have to say also that every day they tried to charge me a different price, always higher than in the website. Make sure you don’t give them your card details because someone there is stealing from you!

It was a wonderful stay at Ingenia Holidays Noosa North. The cabins have everything you need to spend time, cook etc. It was very clean, the whole area but also the crockery. The bed was very comfy. To sum up - we would definitely recommend!
Bit tight for space within the park.
Is been a very nice stay that a second time we are going and the staff are so beautiful 🤩 thank you again

Nice camp ground with very clean amenities. The hot showers are great! A little cramped, maneuvering a big trailer difficulty, tent ok...but don't bring bigger than a 2*4m. We got our RV3 plus awning accommodated...but only just. The games room and pool close at 05:30pm which is a bit inconvenient. The staff is very friendly. At the time of our stay it was very quiet and peaceful although fully booked.
Very out of way area. Need to drive to wherever you're going. Very small park and tight sites. If you've got a big van, I wouldn't recommend it but it was certainly clean and staff were helpful.
Such an amazing family friendly place. Relaxing time.

The cabin we stayed in was clean, the bedding is fresh.  If you need a quite place to stay this is not for you.  We stayed for an early morning balloon ride at Cooroy and its the best spot as it is close to Noosa/Noosaville.

This place is in a handy position , but the caravan sites are to close together .
We felt claustrophobic  .

This would be one of the best kept caravan parks and amenities we have   holidayed in.
A neat and tidy park and helpful staff.
On arrival, the park attendant guides you into your site and has to be the best I've seen. He guided myself and others into their spot in one go, a true magician.
Great spot for a stop. Lovely staff.
Nice enough place. We had a fairly small site for our motor home. It’s fairly tightly packed and about 500m to the North Shore ferry. Toilets clean showers hot.
It was good having a secure area for our dog, and it was quite a big place.

We had a short stay at the Ingenia North Caravan Park Noosa.   Was a perfect place to perch up as close as we could to Noosa Heads.  Bus leaves right outside the park to Noosa Heads.  Nice and easy.  Rather than battling traffic and car parking on the weekend at Noosa. The staff were so super friendly and eager to help with your needs.  Cannot thank them enough for their assistance.  It is a very full park, and caravans close together, so if that is not what you are after, may not be for you.   But on this occasion it suited our needs.  Highly recommend.

Loved this park. Amenities clean, maintained. Camp kitchen well stocked with cleaning supplies and cleaned regularly. Laundry also.Staff helpful and friendly. On our checkout day, our car had to be towed and repaired. They went all out to rearrange bookings to allow us the site until our car was repaired. This was just before Kings birthday weekend, so not a quiet time for them. We really appreciate the effort and this relieved us from having to worry about accom. Would highly recommend.
Clean amenities. Great Wi-Fi connection. Friendly reception staff.
Very good park, especially being guided in to site. Very clean and tidy, on the edge of town

Really nice and helpful staff. Thank you for your kindness, we have a lot of memories here now. Take care of you, we recommend the place !
Chloé & Claire (site 113)
Easy access! Lovely staff and very professional!
Terrible customer service. Cancelled within the free cancellation window over a month ago, still haven't received my refund despite calling them 15 times. Beware of their refund policy

We upgraded to a clamping tent,so beautiful but wrong end of the park for us, behind the toilet block and Friday night several children running riot around us and the road nose was dreadful,as we have stayed in  cabin 28  before without any of these two things occurring so we know where we will book next time as we are elderly.

Schöner Campingplatz für Familien. Zwei Nächte auf einem Stellplatz mit Strom und eigenem Bad, wir wären gerne länger geblieben. Toll ist der beheizte Pool und das Sprungkissen für die Kinder. Direkt vor dem Park ist die Bushaltestelle und man erreicht noosa Main beach oder den River ( deutlich schöner für Kinder) super schnell und günstig. Das Bad am Stellplatz ist sehr geräumig. Die Gemeinschaftsküche ist super ausgestattet auch mit einem Gas Kochfeld, yeah. Abends wurden Outdoor movies gezeigt.

Wow finding this place was like winning lotto. From the moment we pulled up in the check in bay we were greeted by the friendliest person I've ever met. Turns out she was the park manager. Service with the biggest smile nothing was to much trouble.  The park itself was clean, quiet and very tidy. Not wanting to stay in the hussle and bussell of Noosa Heads this place was perfect. Close to everything and just a 15 minute drive to the beaches. Only 5 minutes into Tewantin such a beautiful little town on the river. It's got everything you need shop wise with an RSL and great pub which is dog friendly. The park itself is across the road from the golf course it you want to pull out the clubs.
Now let's get back to the park manager Nicole, turns out she's only been in the job 10 days, what a great asset to any business. Her level of customer service is next level.
My wife and i will definitely be stopping black in there on our way home even if it's just to see Nicole.
Highly recommend this caravan park it ticks all the boxes.

Absolutely loved our stay at Ingenia Holidays Noosa! The camp spot was awesome – spacious, level, and perfectly located. The service from the team was fantastic, friendly and helpful throughout. Amenities were spotless and really well kept. Highly recommend for a relaxing holiday. We'll definitely be back!

We stayed on a powered site! Close to amenities and the most beautiful trees for a bit of privacy. Awesome place and highly recommended if you want a beautiful location and great atmosphere. We will be back all the way from New Zealand.
Stayed in the family glamping tent - 10/10 for families with kids especially. Reception was also extremely friendly and helpful. Will be back 😊
Greay location, 3 bedroom cabin was wonderful.
Fantastic place to stay! Close to everything and the staff were incredibly friendly. We absolutely loved our stay at Ingenia Holidays Noosa and would definitely come back again

Okay place to stay. Bathroom in our cabin needed repairs water leaked all down the floor, through the cracked grout in the shower, making it extremely slippery for kids. Also, a few people flying in and out of the park. Not the parks fault but it didn't seem to be addressed either. Also one rude staff member on multiple occasions the rest were very nice.

One of the staff took a table from our site when we were away, when we asked them they denied and blamed us for leaving our things behind, luckily one of the other guests saw them so they brought it back.
During the whole time the staff was very rude and unfriendly. Shame…
Reccomend this lovely tourist park. Cabin 10/10 very clean and everything you need. Away from the hustle of Noosa.
We were especially happy to find this type of accommodation during our campervan trip. The clean, spacious kitchen made our meal even more enjoyable, and the clear night sky was truly unforgettable.

Rang at last minute. Was no problem and site was great.
Friendly staff. Wonderful facilities. Well kept grounds.
Would stay there again.

這是我們Noosa旅遊住的第一間酒店。我很喜歡這些是一個鄰似營地的獨立屋。酒店前台就在路口的第一個屋，職員很有禮貌，還為我們附上地圖及介紹各個設施的位置，很特別是我們住的兩晚都分別有親子的活動，如Movie Night，可惜我們行程上的時間配合不上，錯過了這些活動，希望再有機會到訪。酒店還有游泳池、BBQ、卓球，很適合一家人帶小朋友渡假，我也看到有小狗，十分寵物有善。我們的獨立屋可以享受自己的空間，每間屋的旁近有獨立的停車位，對自駕遊十分方便，出門就可以上車。還有椅子及椅在外面，若天氣涼一點，在外面也很舒服。廚房設備齊全，雪櫃內有冷藏格，微波爐、熱水壺，但可惜沒有洗碗機，不然會更方便。重點酒店入住說明需要住客做垃圾分類及清理垃圾，營區內有特定位置放置垃圾筒，但房內的垃圾袋比較少，若住個一、兩晚有煮飯的垃圾會不夠放，前台的開放時間也只到20:00，希望酒店可以提供多點垃圾袋使用。獨立屋的空間足夠，客廳有沙發、餐卓、椅子，這次的房型共有一張雙人床及一張碌架床，碌架床在廳的位置，沒有一個獨立房，床也較小，看起來像是給小孩子睡的。雙人床房間是獨立空間，但沒有空調（只有大廳有一部），有天花的風扇，我們12月17-19日入住，晚上較涼爽，開大廳空調可以吹入房內也很涼快。房間空間沒有很大，有梳妝枱及衣櫃收納，能放下2個29吋行李箱（一個在衣櫃、一個在枱底），但會較逼，床墊舒服，2晚都睡得很好！浴室有拉簾，但水會灑出，雨灑也是固定在頭頂，不太方便。有提供洗頭水、護髮素、沐浴露，質量也很好。有提供毛巾，但帶自己的比較乾淨衛生。屋外有紅色花及小樹，陽光照下，聽著鳥兒吱吱叫，十分美麗，心曠神怡。每個窗口也有防蚊紗，要注意其中有一些有破洞，大門出入關門就沒有問題。這次的住宿期間沒有蚊蟲的出現。酒店地點也很好，開車到Heads Main Beach大約20mins，不算離市區很遠，可以享受寧靜、慢活。附近有Woolworths Tewantin超市，開車5mins，自己下廚購物都十分方便。另外，有一間泰國菜十分好吃，名字是Charm Thai Cuisine，我們吃了青咖喱及泰式海鮮炒飯，價錢算合理，在Woolworths Tewantin超市附近！

Fantastic family-friendly stay! Great vibes and very peaceful.

This was our first stop in Noosa, and we loved the cabin-style independent houses—it felt like a premium holiday park experience.
The staff at the front desk were very polite and gave us a helpful map of the facilities. They even organize family activities like Movie Nights, which is a lovely touch! The park features a pool, BBQ area, and pool table, making it perfect for families with kids. It’s also pet-friendly, which added to the welcoming atmosphere.

Our cabin offered great privacy with a dedicated parking space right next to it—super convenient for road trips! There’s also outdoor seating which is perfect for relaxing in cooler weather. The kitchen is well-equipped with a microwave, kettle, and a fridge (with a freezer compartment), though a dishwasher would have been a bonus. Note to guests: You are required to sort and take out your own trash to the designated bins. However, we found there weren't enough trash bags provided for a 2-night stay with cooking. Since reception closes at 8:00 PM, I’d suggest the hotel provide a few extra bags in the room.

The layout is practical: a sofa, dining table, and chairs in the lounge. Our unit had a double bed in a private room and a bunk bed in the living area (best suited for kids). Only the lounge has AC, but the bedroom has a ceiling fan. During our stay (Dec 17-19), the night air was cool enough that the lounge AC reached the bedroom comfortably. The bedroom is a bit snug—we managed to fit two 29-inch suitcases (one in the wardrobe, one under the vanity), but it was tight. The mattress was very comfortable, and we slept soundly!

The bathroom uses a shower curtain, but water tends to splash out, and the fixed overhead shower was a bit inconvenient. However, the quality of the provided toiletries was excellent.

The surroundings are beautiful—waking up to sunshine, flowers, and birds chirping was so refreshing. All windows have fly screens, though a few had small holes, so just be mindful. Luckily, we didn't encounter any mosquitoes during our stay!

Location: It’s a peaceful spot away from the crowds, about a 20-minute drive to Noosa Heads Main Beach. For groceries, the Woolworths in Tewantin is just a 5-minute drive away.

Foodie Tip: Check out Charm Thai Cuisine near the Woolworths! Their Green Curry and Thai Seafood Fried Rice were delicious and reasonably priced.

We are up from Brisbane to celebrate a family birthday and catch up with our 4 yesr old grand daughter. We love the place becausr iy is very clean and has all the amenities we need. We have stayed in msny places like this. It is excellent.

We had a lovely time staying here. The deluxe cabins are nicer than the budget cabins but you do get what you pay for. Either way our kids enjoyed the facilities, there’s a fish and chips shop in front too. The pizza van was not available during our stay so can’t comment on that.
Terrific campsite, well maintained. Haven’t rated the rooms as we were in tents. Relaxed, great pool, nightly movies.
The staff is very polite
We had a short trip overnight to the park it was clean and spacious the staff were friendly will definitely be back and will recommend this park to others

Lovely clean well appointed cabin, great location, park is very nice and quiet with lots of extra benefits EG movies and pizza on site, local bus stops at the front entrance.
Our only grumble is that not all the beds were made up, even though the park knew how many people were staying. This was physically challenging for us and a disappointing welcome.

3 night stay in the ensuite site, the shower was heavenly and was clean and modern.

The park itself was family friendly and no issues with any amenities.

Our read windscreen smashed unexpectedly on check out day and the lovely Emma was relentless with her assistance to help, what would have been a stressful end was a softened blow by their accomodations.

One thousand million percent the best 💜
Brilliant 10/10 can’t wait to go back
Amazing all round!

Stayed in the bunkhouse for two nights and very enjoyed the experience and park. Room had plenty of shelving storage space, comfortable bed and the indoor kitchen is right beside. I believe the $80/night for Noosa is fair. The kitchen and bathrooms were spotless, and the park was quiet. I went for a run by the golf course and spotted some kangaroos!

Excellent caravan park for Families. Jumping pillow, games room, pool, outdoor cinema, table tennis and lawn games. Large tent/caravan sites with plenty of greenery. Excellent camping kitchen.
10 min to Noosaville.
Would definitely stay here again!
Husband and I spent few days at this park. Found them to be very friendly and helpful and approachable. Park is very clean lots to do pool activities etc

Quite park with a small pool, jumping pillow and a small games room.

Location wise you cant walk to anything besides the BP and a golf course.

Driving from the park to Hastings Street is about 15mins.  But can drive to mariners place and the Marina which takes about 5-10 mins.

So it's a good park to stay if you dont want to be in the hustle and bustle bit you are still pretty close to everything.

Todo correcto. La cocina super bien equipada, las instalaciones son muy buenas, duchas y baños super limplios.
Si tengo que poner una pega, es que los pájaros a las 4 de la mañana se ponen a chillar! No exagero, a chillar! Es insoportable.
Good site, bad overall experience
The park has definitely improved since the last time we were hear many years ago.  The ensuite caravan site we had was excellent and the price was very reasonable. Pizza night was great.

We’ve had a very nice stay in one of the deluxe safari tents. The lay-out and design of these was exellent and the outside bathtub was a brilliant feature which was well-used. The reception staff was very welcoming and helpful as we were let into the accommodation almost two hours before normal check-in time.
The only downside I found was the road running alongside the campground was pretty noisy from early mornings till late at the evening. Other than that I can’t find any remarks and will definitely visit again!

We stayed in one of the glamping tents for a week with the family. |The tent was clean and well equipped. The park was great with a lovely swimming pool and movies for the kids on the weekend. The pizza van was awesome as well. |The reason for 4 stars is because of the location of the tent and the noise of the cars and racers along the road. Every night and early in the morning this could be heard and was a let down for the park. If you are not bothered by noise and are a deep sleeper this is a great park, however with younger kids and me being a lighter sleeper it was a big annoyance.  The tents should have been located further into the park where you could enjoy some peace during the night.

Booked a large ensuite site figuring it would be 'large' and maybe they are by caravan standards but we had four sites within arms reach around us. Small children about and with a big (friendly) dog we like to have enough space so that no one gets bumped or knocked over.

Explained this to friendly staff who quickly offered up a solution. Had a look at the alphabet named sites that were much longer with a nice garden like space out the back. This is the road side so a bit of traffic noise that did not bother us. No neighbours in front or back - still quite close on the side (for our liking) but everyone very friendly and respectful.
The place was fully booked and you could have heard a pin drop after 8pm. Amenities spotless and pretty much empty every time I went there.
Gardens well maintained, no litter and camp kitchen has everything you need.
Great family place. Basically in the suburbs of Noosa and we didn't find too many cool places in walking distance with the dog but a short drive to the marina and good fish and chips.
This is a good place to stay when you are in the Noosa area 👍

Lovely restful stay under the shade of the trees. Facilities were all kept clean and tidy. Pizza nights Tuesday and Friday  within the park and Fish and Chips shop at entrance so no cooking required. Park was in easy access for bike riding in the national park or local trails.
quiet, clean and tidy caravan park. Staff are very nice and helpful.
Get spot, got everything you need, really pleasant stay!

Loin de tout, pas de resto, pas d’info. La dame de l’accueil ne nous a absolument pas parlé que l’accès au camping serait fermé toute une matinée à cause d’un triathlon .. très ennuyeux qd on doit prendre un avion le lendemain.. pas cool.
Pretty same as others round here similar offerings prices etc

First time at this location and the room was so different then the usual hotel room that we would usually stay in but it was a great experience.
If I could add something that might have made our stay for the 3days would be have the rooms dusted to reduce the amount of dust in the air as we would sneeze a lot thought out out nights. But all in all it was a nice experience

Have stayed here many time and will return for our yearly visit to QLD. Staff always friendly. Sites are generous. Clean amenities. Away from the hustle and bustle of Noosa yet close enough. Can’t ask for more.

Awful in every sense. Some sites are situated in ‘garbage bin alley’, ie 10 meters from a large bank of wheelie bins and the back of a servo. Soothing sounds of garbage trucks each morning and an air compressor running at night.  In particular, this applies to sites 1 and 2.  They will still sting you full price for the pleasure.||Shower blocks are convenient but water often smells fetid.||Location a definite draw back. A 25 min drive to Main Beach/Hastings Street if there’s traffic. A 16 min drive to Sunshine Beach. Not a ‘few minutes’ as claimed on their website. A 7 min drive to closest supermarket. There’s very little available within easy walking distance.||Camp kitchen always dirty. ||Pool is a mess. Pleasant to look at, filthy to use.||If you’ve ever experienced a good holiday park, you understand the value of the quiet peace, enjoyment and relaxation they offer. Avoid this one.

We spent 4 nights at this park at an ensuite site, the ensuite was clean and tidy, The park was great with movies being shown every night during school holidays. It was also great that they had a caravan selling pizza two nights a week. The park was pretty full but was quiet at night. Apart from a number of small pieces of litter left by other people the park was fairly clean and the staff members were friendly.
Great park and facilities.

Mooie en vooral schone camping met alles erop en eraan.Buitenbarbecues kun je gratis gebruiken.
Film elke avond.
Hele fijne ontvangst bij de receptie.
Dichtbij alle belangrijke plaatsen.
Rustig gelegen.
Zeer aan te raden

Stayed in one of the glamping tents with 3 & 9 year old, it was brilliant. Kids loved the out door bath, tent had everything you could possible need and more. Outdoor movies every night was a brilliant touch! Only negative was the games room closed early, which isn’t really a negative at all! Would recommend this to any families. Cannot wait to be back!

Overall, the campground itself was good — our site was nice, and I appreciated that the grounds were kept tidy and leaves were cleared regularly.

However, I had a very unpleasant experience with one of the male cleaning staff. When I went to use the amenities, there was a cleaning cart in front of the door and a “Caution: Wet Floor” sign, but no “Closed” sign. As soon as I tried to enter, the cleaner immediately told me it was closed. I said there was no sign indicating that, and he suddenly became irritated, followed me outside, pointed at the wet floor sign and said rudely, “There’s the sign.” I told him it only said “Wet Floor,” not “Closed,” and then he got even more aggressive, stepped closer and raised his voice.

I didn’t feel scared, but his behavior was very hostile and intimidating. He then said it would be open in 5 minutes. After waiting about 15 minutes, I came back, and he was outside chatting. When I tried again, he shouted at me once more that it was closed and to wait another 5 minutes. Honestly, I felt really disrespected and frustrated by this situation. I reported the incident to reception when we checked out.

The bathrooms were also only semi-clean — lots of spider webs and big spiders around, so it seemed like they were only cleaned quickly on the surface.

Apart from this incident, the campground itself is fine, but this experience really left a bad impression.
Clean and well maintained
Excellent

Nice, clean, quiet and friendly caravan park. I booked a 2 night stay that turned into a 3 night stay. The staff were very accommodating with adding an extra night late notice. The facilities are very clean, the park provides free dish liquid, cleaning essentials in the communal kitchen. Heated pool was amazing! They have plenty of activities for kids. Will be back with the whole family next time😀

$56p.n. for two on powered slab with ensuite seemed a good price for area so booked 4 nights, and regretted it. Camp has the standard amenities, plus a few extras like games room and fish and chip shop on site so technically good and would have given it 4 stars for a few petty gripes like arriving an hour after check in and still not getting ensuite key until 2pm, ensuite had strong sewerage odour and low shower pressure defeating purpose of saving water as it takes forever to rinse off soap and shampoo. Luke warm laundry dryers required $18 (3 cycles) and load still came out damp. Although the lateral site space was great there's only a hedge separating me from the site at the rear and had a Brian Blessed character a few feet behind yakking to midnight, then a Barney in a cabin in front in the wee hours. There's significant night noise from the servo fronting the park too, guessing ice machine compressor kicking in and out through the night and some low pitched warbling machine throb. You won't get a great night's sleep. The kitchen is a bit a hike if you're getting on a bit, there's two stovetop and burner rings in a well populated park so packed food and implements into esky bag and trundled up unsuccessfully a few times to find it in use and left bag outside van in the end. First time anyone's stolen from us in six months of travelling. Yep, that's just annoying stuff knocking a star off. What knocked it down to 2 stars was being put on a site (there was a vacant one 10m away) where a tradie arrived the next morning to start digging holes, mix cement in a wheel barrow, drill and generally make a lot of noise right behind my van. This was on and off for most of the second day. He was back early on the third day for but thankfully stopped for a short reprieve until two tradies started doing work on an ensuite roof or something just behind us that went on til late afternoon. Pretty much pee'd off I spent my holiday on a construction site, you think they'd have the decency to at least warn you, if not move you to a quieter area. Couldn't read, watch TV or even hear myself think for most of that last day. Don't go here if you like peace and quiet.

We stayed for three nights with our daughter, son in-law and the grandchildren. We had sites besides each other. There are raised artificial turf slabs for under the awning. We were on site E, which made it very easy to reverse into.

The lady in the office was very friendly and helpful. The amenities are clean and not far from our site.

The main pool was heated and there was a jumping pillow and even a kids movie on Saturday night. There's electric BBQ handy too.

Only a five minute drive into Tewantin as well. If we find ourselves in the Noosa region again would definitely stay in the park.

We've been caravanning in this park for about 6 years....we like the area and the staff are excellent, very helpful...but we think that this park hasn't changed for years, and needs a lot more TLC around all of the caravan sites etc. The sites need more grass and gravel etc...around the amenities could look better with plants etc...🤗
Highly recommended

My wife and I are staying three nights late July 25 on a large site in our 7.5m motorhome and our site is large. Have found it to be pretty quiet but on Tuesdays and Fridays the pizza van which is just behind our site and other sites, is open from 5pm to about 7.30pm and it pumps loud music from external speakers for that time which is extremely annoying and unnecessary. I'd suggest low level music or better still none at all. It's not as if we all don't know pizza is on as got a text and also flyer at check-in. Park pretty good otherwise and good base from us to ride our bikes into Noosa from. As an aside water pressure to our rig is very poor. Have taken our online filter out and no difference so not sure why.
Also make sure your not on a site next to the side or main road as hoons flying around in cars at night.
Stayed 3 nights in En suite site. Lovely well kept park. Also used services of Milton & Glenn (on notice board) for looking after my fur baby- they were awesome, highly recommend park & dog sitters🐾
3 bed Cabins clean and well appointed, park looks well maintained and staff were friendly. Just a quick stop for us this time but will look to make it longer in future.
Only issue is the wifi not great for when travelling for work

We met up with friends staying here while we were at Ingenia Holidays Noosa North. This site had more of a vibe and lots on offer for the kids including movie nights. It also has a jumping pillow which the other place doesn't have for the kids. One negative is that it has no controlled access which could be a security risk for theft overnight.
Great place to stay, very neat and tidy site with plenty of amenities

Nice place with full of amenities including heated swimming pool. Plenty of accommodations with glamping, powered sites, cabins and camp facilities. Pizza night and open air movie options were great additions. Accessible to the Noosa junction with a bus stop just across the road. Though it takes quite long to get there.
Great caravan park, we had a great time here. Great facilities and lovely staff.

Ingenia Holidays Noosa was a fantastic surprise! Our original plans fell through, and they were incredibly accommodating with a caravan site at short notice. The holiday park is in a beautiful location and really well maintained. We loved the laid-back atmosphere and the excellent amenities—especially the interesting play areas for the kids, a well-equipped camp kitchen, and the lovely evening sounds of birds echoing through the park. The wood fire pizzas in the evening were a real treat, and the morning coffee stall was the perfect start to the day. Highly recommended for families or anyone looking for a relaxed, enjoyable stay!
Everything I needed plus more. A well run park. I took a budget cabin and there was nothing budget about it.Will definitely be back.

Eine der besten Campingplätze, auf dem wir je waren- Hund und Familienfreundlich, eine Tankstelle direkt vor der Tür, ein beheizter Pool, Spielräume  für Kinder...und extrem sauber! Leider ist unser Wagen stehen geblieben, wir mussten auf einen neuen warten und durften ohne Aufpreis unseren alten Stellplatz benutzen. Unsere Tochter bekam ein Eis von der Rezeption. Wirklich top! Absolute Empfehlung!!!

Business trip with a 2 night stay in a 1 bedroom Deluxe cabin.

I wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude following my recent business trip and stay at your property in the 1-bedroom Deluxe cabin. Overall, I had a very pleasant experience. Despite encountering a couple of unforeseen issues, I was impressed with how promptly the manager addressed and resolved them within an hour of my arrival.

The staff were exceptionally friendly, and I found the property to be clean and tidy. My cabin was well-equipped with everything I needed, contributing to a comfortable stay.

I will certainly consider staying here again for both business and pleasure in the future. Thank you for making me feel at home during my visit.

Best regards,
Andy
Lovely quiet park, staff are very helpful 😀
A bit outside of Noosa. Great park, well maintained, everything just is a bit older. Would definitely go back
Very quiet Resort 👍

Noosa beach is very close by, and it was super convenient to have a gas station and convenience store right by the entrance of the accommodation. The luxury safari tent had been newly renovated, so everything felt brand new and in excellent condition. It was the perfect place for a family with children to enjoy a comfortable and memorable stay.

Small and quite park that is in dire need of a good dose of general site maintenance with some decent DRAINAGE  & a bit of compacted road base plus  blue metal around the caravan/tent sites. This will alleviate the site/s becoming just 1 big slush pile of water logged grass & mud! This is exactly what we & neighbouring sites had🤦‍♀️ Our site was no 32 (large ensuite site) and although we acknowledge it’s been raining on and off for a week there is absolutely no excuse for not maintaining these sites better for Queensland weather conditions which as we all know includes intense rain & storms. Walking around the park this doesn’t  appear to be an isolated problem throughout the park and it was evident on nearly every  caravan site especially the ensuited sites. For the money these parks charge they need to do better. It certainly is far from the standard of other Big4 and let us clarify we don’t mind wet weather but what we we do mind is paying top dollar when our stay is impacted purely by the lack of site maintenance which makes it impossibly to enjoy or move around due to the site condition. This could easily be addressed to make the stay of customers more enjoyable with a solution outlined earlier. Ensuite internally could also do with some updating & has very reduced water pressure & smelt disgusting the entire stay. Not looking for a response from this park as you can’t gloss over the issue no matter which way they try and spin the situation. Overall disappointed

We’re staying here for two nights. Our powered site is conveniently located near the amenities and the bus stop into Noosa Heads, which is great. However, I had an unpleasant experience today when I went to use the toilet facilities and was unexpectedly met with a staff member cleaning inside. Rather than a polite request, I was shouted at quite aggressively and told to leave without being offered an alternative. The tone was unnecessarily harsh, and it left a very negative impression. I believe some customer service training would be highly beneficial for the staff to ensure guests are treated with courtesy and respect.
If the weather was better, probably a great spot, but it coloured the experience...
Prima camperplek. Schone douches en toiletten. Handige en ruime campkitchen! 😍
Rainy wet night but we got really good pizza in the park that evening!

Good family camp ground, lots of stuff to do. Short drive to the beach and shops. Also it's a bonus that we could take the dog. Amazing stay and beautiful place to holiday. There is a service station near attached to the camp ground

Loved our stay here! Warm pool, fun family events like movie nights and kids discos, plus handy food trucks. Great location—close to Noosa and shops next door. Clean facilities and friendly staff. We enjoyed it so much we extended our stay! Only downside was a few dogs barking in the early morning, but no big deal.
I was satisfied by the room which is clean and quite plus the kitchen is pretty big for cooking.
Due to weather conditions we needed to move from an ensuite caravan site to a cabin. We were fitted in and were able to stay with our group of friends for another 2 dats.

My partner and I just stayed 5 night and it was awesome.
Cabins are well equipped with what you need, including cooking utensils. Rooms are clean & spacious.
Helen at reception is amazing, friendly and welcoming.
Emma (maintenance) was friendly and funny. Pool is refreshing and clean.
Park is relatively quiet except for some kids riding around on scooters/bikes yelling in between cabins and on the roads.
Handy to have a petrol station right out front and a take away shop.
We will definitely return next time we want some time away again.

I have been their guest twice in two different sort of accommodation and both times I found it brilliant . Spotless clean, private , discrete I am honestly impressed. Kitchen had everything I needed for a weekly stay. Refrigerator and fridge, they are like medium size apartments and u have everything u need just there including laundry and relaxing spaces … on top of your own veranda. Absolutely loved it .
Very enjoyable stay, the cabin had everything to your fingertips and close to golf club for a meal, also Helen in the office was very helpful and happy and kind.

The facility is very wellMaintained, clean and functional to combine business trip with holidays activities. The staff is very friendly and available. The room/ bungalow very spacious and comfortable with anything u need even for a medium term stay
Einer der schönsten, besten und natürlichsten cpgrounds since I am I'm Australia! I visited about 195 campgrounds within 12 month. A little bit expensive but there is all you need!
位置離市中心開車15-20分鐘，園區很大也很安靜、房間空間也還行、有廚房很方便！可以自己煮飯。還可以到泳池和遊戲室玩～
Absolute stunning job, we had some issues with our slide on camper and the whole team help us without hesitation and provide us an outstanding help and solutions! Many thanks, we will be back 100%.

Had a five night stay at a large caravan site, which was indeed quite big.  Quite a busy time.  The amenities were clean as was the area in the laundry room.  Pets included.  Was also surprised how many dogs were off lead around their caravan sites which with a reactive dog having been attacked by off leash dog was disappointing.  Obviously owned fault. Also the speed that the children were going round on the scooters was out of control.  Cars have to go 10kms but obviously no rules for scooters.  Again disappointing.  A bit of a way out of Noosa but then there are no caravan parks within Noosa itself that take dogs and took about 20 mins every which was to get anything done.  Nothing seems to be in the one place.  An extremely busy place even outside peak hours.  Would use the Caravan Park again as well maintained and looked after.

Overall is ok.
But Someone steal our drink. We don't mind but this is show how safe in the park.

And the cleanness of kitchen area quite dirty, the first day (Tuesday) was good but on Wednesday and Thursday so dirty. A lot of fly from the bins, full of trash. Look like no cleaning and none manage on that days.

Some group of people too loud at night, like not respect to others stay.

Hope the park's manager will look after more.
Great park, friendly staff,nice pool.a bit pricey, but so where the other parks in the area.hoilday season was busy.
Staff are unfriendly, unhelpful and disorganised. I have never been made to feel so unwelcome at holiday accommodation in my life.
Enjoyed our stay here. Only problem is the Games Room looks absolutely depressing.

A clean, well kept and service site. We've stayed in our caravan on an ensuite site and at a two bedroom flat. Great experience, staff are super friendly and helpful.

The van sites are spacious so you are not jam packed against your neighbour. The ensuite sites are fantastic and not too pricey.

The heated pool area is great with a nice kids pool area, again it is kept clean and nicely presented with adequate seating around the pool. Even the big pool has a large step, so you can have the little ones on that while the big kids swim too.

The kitchen area is beautiful. Wish it had an oven but it has two big BBQs and common fridge and sink with dishwashing liquid provided.

BP Service station on-site at the front of the park is also a big help if you need to restock staples or run out of gas like we did.

We stayed in Unit 1, and the mattress sagged and was very uncomfortable. Additionally, the shared kitchen was only cleaned twice during our stay. It would be better if it were cleaned daily, and the bathroom needs to be cleaned more frequently when the place is full of people

We stayed at the powered grass site for 5 nights with our 2 kids during the Christmas period 2024. The space was generous and the amenities were clean. Grass sites were close to the bathrooms which was fantastic. Arcade room, the pool and night cinema was enjoyable for the kids. Previously, we have stayed at the Ingenia Noosa North, but this one was much better than the North resort.
It’s nice location near to everything, petrol station is just outside so you will never run out of ice to keep your beer cold.
Was good, till they started locking my food in a fridge, without giving a password, or giving a wrong one. Have to wait 2 hours till they open
Bloody beautiful...great price for this time of year
Great location, excellent staff, clean and comfortable beds, great value for money. Thank you!
Loved the stay in the one bedroom cabin. Noosa is very pretty also.
Apart from the traffic noise... Not bad

An extremely well maintained and managed holiday park packed with features and central for exploring Noosa and surrounds. The powered sites are generous with canopies of trees and the ensuite was spotless. Plenty to entertain those with family but I had enough trouble removing toddler grandson from swimming pool and jumping pillow before he held out for his onsite pizza and movie. A clear winner for us and will be back.

We stayed at a powered site over the weekend and the park is well located and family friendly. However I’m disappointed about the state of the bathrooms in the park, the sanitary (period) bins were over flowing meaning the cubicles were full of flies, we were there for 3 days and they were never emptied and this was unfortunately the case in most of the cubicles I had to use which feels really unhygienic :( also I understand it’s the guests responsibility to ensure washing machines are clean after use, but they also need a deep clean as our clothes came out smelling really damp, overall quite disappointed as this was an expensive site, and I feel like we’ve stayed at council run, free camps that had cleaner facilities!
Always stop here. Really enjoyed everything about our stay

Powered ensuite site...ensuite old and dated but clean. They could really do with an update and a deep clean..does not offer bathmats, toiletries or towels which alot of other parks up and down the coast do...however we enjoyed our stay the parknis well maintained and the camp kitchen is clean tidy and well appointed..loved the instant hot water!

A great little place for an escape. I found this especially kid friendly with a heated pool, kids splash pool, jumping pad. Late night movies on a projector screen near the pool. Pizzas available on site 2 nights a week. A coffee truck also a couple of nights per week. Camp friendly with a choice of cabins and powered sites. It’s a short drive to the main drag of Hastings st in Noosa Heads, which is great for a day at the beach. It’s only about 30 minutes to the airport too.

Der Platz liegt  etwas außerhalb, es sind ca. 10 km bis Noosa head, ist aber ist sehr schön. Wir sind immer reingefahren, wobei es in Noosa mit den Parkplätzen für ein Campervan von 7 Metern schon schwierig ist, einen Parkplatz zu bekommen. Es gibt aber auch eine Busverbindung vor der Tür.  Der Platz war sauber und gepflegt. Wir hatten ein eigenes Badezimmer am Platz. Nachmittags haben wir viele Papageien gesehen. Wir haben den Aufenthalt sehr genossen. Das Personal an der Rezeption war nett.

We stayed here for a week. Beautiful park. Clean amenities. I just had a bad experience with the Filipino cleaners. I am Filipino myself, but they weren't nice to me. They were, however, friendly with the white guests. I tried smiling at them, but they didn’t smile back and instead gave me a dirty look. 😆 I accidentally slammed the washing machine lid while the older lady was there cleaning. I apologised, but she didn’t seem to like it and mumbled something. Later, my partner and I were using the BBQ, and as we were eating, she came by to clean. She asked if we were still using it, and I said no, obviously (we were planning to clean it after finishing our breakfast). She started mumbling something again, like she was complaining. Then she told another white guest about the mess, trying to get her sympathy. She said it out loud so I could hear her: 'It's okay, we will check the CCTV to see who did it.' That's when I told her that we weren’t done eating yet and that we would clean it afterward. Her attitude really put me off. I don't understand how they can be so rude to a fellow Filipino.
Beautiful place to vacation and relax
Nice quiet caravan park and dog friendly. Friendly staff. Toilet / shower blocks are kept clean. Golf course across the road and a BP servo out the front. We had a great stay.

This place is really top of the pops..
The ladies in the reception as well as the cleaning should all have pay rises.!
Amazing service ultra convenient if you are going the mountain biking at Tewantin, heaps of activities for families..
I will be back for sure.
Great park, very clean and well looked after
Really great park with heated swimming pool, kitchen and TV area, games room and outdoor movie screen. Very spacious plots. Short drive to most attractions and the main town centre.
Lovely little park and good value for the price.
We stayed in your 3 bedroom cabin last week. Very impressed. The food from the caravan on Wednesday evening was delicious. Very handy to have the BP next door too.

We had an ensuite caravan site.  We extended our stay so obviously liked it a lot. An excellent experience.  One negative was the slamming of campervan doors throughout the night..Not managements fault but maybe they should to put overnight campervans together instead interspersing them amongst the the longer term campers
Great place for grey nomads to rest up for a week or 2. 🤷😉
What a fantastic park. We stayed in an ensuite site with our campervan. Park is pet friendly. We didn’t stay long enough to enjoy the heated pool and other facilities. Would definitely stay again.

Great caravan park, very friendly and helpful staff.  Amenities clean and onsite food truck a bonus.  Disappointed there was no off leash dog area.  Park has plenty of room to install one and hopefully in future this will be considered.

The camping was very nice and we had an ensuite site which was great. There was a big jumping cushion for the kids and a nice swimmingpool. They played movies on a big movie screen which was lovely and the kitchen was extremely clean. We had a great stay and the location was nice, just a short drive away from Noosa.
