For sure would recommend!

This was a great caravan park. Amenities were clean. It’s not close to water if that’s what you are after and is a little way from town but the pool is heated and the outdoor cinema and pizza van make this park stand out. The streets in this park are great for taking training wheels of little ones bikes when they’re ready to learn to ride without them. Our little guy learned to ride his bike here. Thanks to the friendly team at Ingenia for securing this last minute booking for us.
Good park, amenities need a little love great for the kids lots of activities

We booked an ensuite site, on our first try we couldn't get our camper trailer to co-operate. Called and asked staff what to do and they happily moved us to a flatter spot to make it easier for us.
Facilities were really great, the kids had a blast and us parents could kick back and relax!
Not far from major attractions but also quiet enough that there wasn't a lot of noise or hustle and bustle.
Will be back :)

We had an amazing time, the young blonde lady Marie at the service station next door at Ingenia BP was excellent. She helped us find amazing local nature spots. We did the National park walk and the Mt Timberwah sunrise and a great Thai spot for lunch. Then the Noosa River Queen sunset cruise. Thanks to her we had a blast. She even swapped our gas and lifted it into the car for us.|We found the park lovely the pool was nice. Close to everything.

Great holiday park! Bunker rooms are awesome bang for buck and the kitchen and ammenities attached are modern, clean and well stocked. The lady on reception (sorry I didn’t get your name) was so friendly, helpful and even got us into our room early. Thank you!
Decently priced for noosa, the only reason why it didn't get 5 stars as I felt it it need a few more kids play equipment

Great park, clean and well maintained.  Pet friendly options available.

Enjoyed an small ensuite site as a tent camper and I felt like I was glamping - was great treat to have a lock up private bathroom and toilet with double powerpoint and hot water basin.   I was in the quieter end of the park on Acacia Street. I attended over a public holiday long weekend and still found it comfortable.

Short drive to local sites and beaches.  Great staff all round. Fish & chips shop on site is fast and affordable plus seen a pizza van comes twice a wk and you have the servo right next door for any essentials, fuel, air and firewood etc.   Lots of activities for the kids with a jumping pillow, pool and games room to name a few.

Recommended for anyone and all camping styles. Heaps of different accommodation options to choose from.

Very busy place
Easy to book. Helpful staff.
Amenities were clean
Pools kids and adult were nice and clean.
Overall the park was kept very clean.
Laundry area could be a little better with how buy the park is.
Coffee Van in park
Pizza on a Friday night.
Kids games room clean.

5 min drive to town centre.
Favourite caravan park in Noosa. Also dog friendly

I think images on the website should be upgraded to match what is factual; for over $200 a night, I would have expected the standard of images, not the reality. Even though overall it was a still a good stay, it was not value for money. I think this park may be a little older than others we have stayed in and was overall very tired and in need of refresh. We had the door fall off, the blind above the bed fall down, and the beside lamp did not work within minutes of entering the cabin on completion of unloading of vehicle. The maintenance staff were very friendly and supplied the parts needed to fix these things. Sliding screen door was old and worn, thus it was easy to fall off, but also easy to put back on runners.
I have never seen a place so spotless clean in all 15 years I have used these services in Australia. Amazing comfortable stay.
We rented a cabin it was very clean I would love to stay again.
Loved our stay will definitely be back
Great place to stay for a budget-friendly family holiday. Helen, at reception, was very helpful and friendly. I highly recommend their cabins for a comfy stay.

A great place to stay. Very kid and pet friendly. Close to restaurant and shops.
We will definitely stay there next time we are up that way. Noosa has plenty to offer.
Best holiday park in Noosa, clean, quite convenient. highly recommend
friendly staff, clean and comfortable cabins, my kids love the park very much
Family friendly location.  Amenities were central and accessible.  Staff were pleasant.
Lovely spot for a holiday. Good bus service at the entrance to get into Noosa Beach. Lovely pool for a swim.

High standard and spacious accommodation, we had the 3 bed cabin. Good space for those camping or with vans. Kids activities. Next to a servo, fish and chips and on-site pizza van gave added convenience. Staying in school holidays we expected it to be overly crowded but was pleasantly surprised. Camp staff exceptionally friendly giving it a community feel. Highly recommend.
Value for money
celebrated my wife's birthday with our good friends and had a very good experience here.
Great little place. Dig friendly. Quite. Close to Noosa and parks. Clean plenty of things for kids to do.

Loved our stay.
We stayed in the bunk house.
Was just a room with a bed, air con, TV, a few small cabourds.
Was great.
Room was clean, bed was comfy, air con wad cold.
Well worth the money and WILL stay again.

Very understanding front office staff.
Well looked after park with a great variety of
accommodation, activities and features.
Great family place. Everything you need is here and nearby. Kids had a fabulous time which meant adults did also.
Stayed in our van, great place for kids plenty to do. Has an in house pizza guy twice a week and fish and chips .

Family friendly site with great social amenities, pizza van & singer.
Fair walk into town.
Good ensuite powered slab.
Great site for kids.
Cabin was great. Fantastic value for money

we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. It was great to explore Noosa perfect location. The park was clean and had great amenities. The staff were excellent. We really enjoyed the free entertainment on Friday night and the pizzas it was fantastic. Thanks
Large caravan sites, friendly service, amenities spotless. Would recommend !
I had a camp site. Was great
Good
Great family park with great facilities for the kids. Close to many attractions.
Fantastic service! A great park with great facilities.
Wonderful spot, it was great so many families out with there children relaxing and enjoying hoilday time together
Good Van Park.  Large Van sites are a good size . Facilities and park are very clean and staff were friendly and helpful
Park has very coastal feel. Close to beaches, hinterland and shops. Really felt like we were on a holiday which is not always how we feel at some caravan parks. Thanks to all that made it possible 😀
All's good 👍

Lovely warm pool. Great pool area.
Very clean bathrooms. We were lucky to be on a large site but they vary.
Great location although next to a main traffic area. Close enough to Noosa and surrounds.

Love this park - we've stayed several times now. The sites are large and the ensuite is clean and well stocked. It's in a great location close to trails, shopping, and restaurants. They also have a pizza van on site, which is delicious and very popular.
Enjoyed our stay. Well located, friendly and most helpful staff
Caravan sites are very generous, great park
Staff very friendly and extremely helpful
Great location and a clean park

First time staying at this location and as a family with 2 kids we were very happy with the facilities and the staff were so welcoming.

Vey kid friendly kids loved the pool and Jumping pillow and the movie nights were really nice and relaxing.

We will book again for sure in future.
Too far out from everything.  Okay park if you want to drive everywhere . Traffic is crazy through Noosa so took more than 30 minutes to get to Hastings Street. I wouldn’t recommend .
Great place! Great amenities and facilities for everyone. Definitely recommend it!

We stayed a single night in a well appointed 3 bedroom cabin which was perfect for our requirements.  There was no noise that we noticed although we stayed near the entrance to the resort. They even minded our bags during our transition to another location, fantastic..
We loved our experience at Ingenia and will definitely be back ♥️
Easy to access park, with good location.

Great park in a good location for visiting the area. The saff are very helpful and friendly. The park is easy to access with a caravan and the site a quite spacious.
We would stay again
More bins to put  Rubbish in at BBQ Area & cleaning stuff too clean Bbq
Stayed in Caravan Park - all nice, neat and clean
hunderte Känguru auf dem Platz, ein tolles Erlebnis

I think this is one of the best parks i have ever stayed at. It was quiet, clean and friendly. I could not fault it. I would recommend for all family types great facilities for singles and families alike

Great caravan park, staff went above and beyond to allow us a late checkout so my daughter and i wernt rushed to get to the sirport. Great heated pool, jumping pillow and games room for the kids. We loved our stay here :)
Really good caravan park. Good size sites
Awesome area, family friendly with heaps of activities for the kids! Will definitely be back!
We were very pleased with the park. We had a lovely large space and backed onto an open area, so no neighbours back up behind up. Lovely clean facilities and BBQ area.

this is a great place to stay, albeit very expensive. I cant work out where the price if a site (admittedly it was an ensuite) went to over one hundred dollars a night. Excellent quality park though with wonderful facilities and friendly staff

Overall a nice park.  But way way way too many trees.  We were under a constant barrage of seed pods and tree limbs falling onto the roof of our van.  |Amenities were very clean.|Pool area was fantastic with the heated pool.|This park has a pizza van on Tuesday and Friday evenings with the best pizzas. Quite a suprise to stay in this newer type of holiday park cabin. Finish of the cabin and organization is "modern" and good. Hope the other caravan park can match your quality.

Stayed on powered site along the fence line.  Overall this park is good but has way way too many trees and we were under a constant  barrage of seed pods, tree limbs and leaves onto the roof of the van and annex.   Hardly got any sun because of the trees.
The pool area is amazing as the pool is heated.  The amenities were always very clean.
The pizza van served very delicious pizza.  The van could be open more often than 2 nights per week.
Lovely park. Good facilities  fish n chips takeaway on site. Would stay again.
A lovely family friendly caravan park.
Wow, what an awesome place. I don't think anyone would be disappointed. If you don't go, you'll never know.
Di Bolitho particularly, and all staff are so lovely and helpful in every way.
Excellent stay, lots of activities.

Very well located, very quiet and family friendly, well maintained and clean, the amenities are kept irreproachably clean .  I’d very much like to give an even better rating, but for the laundry which has too few (4) small, outdated washing machines, one of which was broken down, and two unsatisfactorily small dryers.  The machines are all coin operated, a legacy of last century’s technology.  There is no coin machine nor will the office provide coins, and there is no bank nearby.  The place is near and quiet, a good, safe pool.  Go for it!
Best little over night stay for a family of 4
Very happy with our stay
Great place clean and tidy lots, had a recreational craft, which management happily accommodated me for to wash down after a days use , thx guys you’ll be seeing me again soon!
Great space to stay and work well with our group, very friendly service! Good location outside of Noosa and accessible to all of our other activities.
Good site, excellent amenities, good location and pet-friendly.
Very good and very clean park. Staff very kind

camped over the weekend, paid $44-52/night for a camper van
the amenities are very clean, there is a laundry room, camp kitchen and heated swimming pool. last night they put Cars on a massive screen to watch for everyone :)
would definitely recommend:)
